lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you join the Emissaries?

lines.speaker: Tenoch
lines.text: To do my duty, of course. Ralos and Ranul wish us to bring about the end of this world. Only then will we see the birth of a new one.

lines.speaker: Tenoch
lines.text: To do my duty, of course. Ralos and Ranul wish us to bring about the end of this world. Only then will we will all unite in Mictl.

lines.speaker: Tenoch
lines.text: I worship both Ralos and Ranul equally, for in reality they are one. They have been separated for now, but soon they will rejoin once more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Final Dawn.

lines.speaker: Tenoch
lines.text: The Final Dawn is our destiny. Ralos and Ranul will unite us all and end this world, but in doing so, we will all play a part in forming a new one.

lines.speaker: Tenoch
lines.text: The Final Dawn is our destiny. Ralos and Ranul will unite us all and end this world, but in doing so, they will grant us eternal life in Mictl.
